title: Stabilize trudoc paths for web workspace CI and Coolify

source.subject: fix(ci,docs): stabilize trudoc paths for web workspace CI and Coolify

body:
Introduces `.github/actions/setup-beskid-web`, `site/website/scripts/run-trudoc.mjs`, and workflow updates so docs-site, platform-spec-contracts, and security-audits resolve trudoc through `beskid_web_common` consistently in CI and Coolify builds.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`1b0a15c`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/1b0a15c)
- **Subject:** fix(ci,docs): stabilize trudoc paths for web workspace CI and Coolify
- **Completed:** 2026-05-26

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `repo-cicd`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-cicd-realized`

## What shipped

Introduces `.github/actions/setup-beskid-web`, `site/website/scripts/run-trudoc.mjs`, and workflow updates so docs-site, platform-spec-contracts, and security-audits resolve trudoc through `beskid_web_common` consistently in CI and Coolify builds.
